title: PwD - Explore Product Tabs (Features, Reviews Etc) - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-81: PwD - Explore Product Tabs. Validates that a PwD user can switch between information tabs (Features, Technical and Accessibility, Buying Guide, Reviews, Raise a Query) on the product details page, only one tab content is visible at a time, tab switching is instant without page reload, and each tab displays its expected content.

testCases.title: All five tabs are visible on product details page
steps: Click View Details on a product.
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in and on a product details page.
expectedResults: All 5 tabs are visible.

testCases.title: Features tab is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Features tab exists.

testCases.title: Technical and Accessibility tab is present
steps: Verify Technical and Accessibility tab exists.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Technical and Accessibility tab exists.

testCases.title: Buying Guide tab is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Buying Guide tab exists.

testCases.title: Reviews tab is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Reviews tab exists.

testCases.title: Raise a Query tab is present
steps: Verify Raise a Query tab exists.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Raise a Query tab exists.

testCases.title: First tab is active by default
steps: Verify the first tab is active by default.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: First tab is active by default.

testCases.title: Clicking a tab makes it active
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Clicking a tab makes it active.

testCases.title: Only one tab content is visible at a time
steps: Verify only one tab panel is visible at a time.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Only one tab content panel is visible at a time.

testCases.title: Tab switching does not reload the page
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: URL does not change when switching tabs.

testCases.title: Active tab is visually highlighted
steps: Verify the active tab has distinct visual styling.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Active tab has distinct visual styling.

testCases.title: Switching all tabs sequentially works
steps: Click each of the 5 tabs in order.
Verify each becomes active and shows content.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Each of the 5 tabs becomes active and shows content.

testCases.title: Features tab displays content when active
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Features tab content panel is visible when active.

testCases.title: Features tab shows key product features
steps: Verify feature list or feature text is displayed.
testCases.preconditions: Features tab is active.
expectedResults: Feature list or feature text is displayed.

testCases.title: Features tab has Who is it for section
steps: Verify 'Who is it for' section or similar heading is present.
testCases.preconditions: Features tab is active.
expectedResults: 'Who is it for' section or similar heading is present.

testCases.title: Features tab content is non-empty
steps: Verify the content area has non-empty text.
testCases.preconditions: Features tab is active.
expectedResults: Content area has non-empty text.

testCases.title: Technical and Accessibility tab displays content
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Technical and Accessibility tab content is visible when active.

testCases.title: Technical specifications section is visible
steps: Verify technical specifications content is displayed.
testCases.preconditions: Technical and Accessibility tab is active.
expectedResults: Technical specifications content is displayed.

testCases.title: Accessibility features section is visible
steps: Verify accessibility features content is displayed.
testCases.preconditions: Technical and Accessibility tab is active.
expectedResults: Accessibility features content is displayed.

testCases.title: Technical tab content is non-empty
steps: Verify the content area has non-empty text.
testCases.preconditions: Technical and Accessibility tab is active.
expectedResults: Content area has non-empty text.

testCases.title: Buying Guide tab displays content
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Buying Guide tab content is visible when active.

testCases.title: Before you Buy section is visible
steps: Verify 'Before you Buy' section or similar content is present.
testCases.preconditions: Buying Guide tab is active.
expectedResults: 'Before you Buy' section or similar content is present.

testCases.title: Buying Guide content is non-empty
steps: Verify the content area has non-empty text.
testCases.preconditions: Buying Guide tab is active.

testCases.title: Reviews tab displays content
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Reviews tab content is visible when active.

steps: Verify a 'Write a review' button or link is present.
testCases.preconditions: Reviews tab is active.
expectedResults: 'Write a review' button or link is present.

testCases.title: Reviews tab content is non-empty
steps: Verify the content area has non-empty text.
testCases.preconditions: Reviews tab is active.

testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Raise a Query tab content is visible when active.

testCases.title: Ask the assistive partner section is visible
steps: Verify 'Ask the assistive partner' section or query form is present.

expectedResults: 'Ask the assistive partner' section or query form is present.

testCases.title: Raise a Query content is non-empty
steps: Verify the content area has non-empty text.

expectedResults: Content area has non-empty text.

testCases.title: Tabs render correctly on mobile viewport
steps: Verify tabs are visible and clickable.
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile (375x667).
expectedResults: Tabs are visible and clickable on mobile.

testCases.title: Tabs render correctly on tablet viewport
steps: Verify tabs are visible and clickable.
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to tablet (768x1024).
expectedResults: Tabs are visible and clickable on tablet.

testCases.title: Tab content persists after page refresh
steps: Verify the product page still loads with tabs visible.
testCases.preconditions: User clicked a non-default tab.
expectedResults: Product page still loads with tabs visible after refresh.
